title: [BUG] Upgrade jszip to fix the vulnerabilities
author: PranjalAgni
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

The current latest version of `exceljs`  (v4.3.0) has an indirect vulnerability coming from `jszip` package. 
Check this synk page for more details: https://security.snyk.io/package/npm/jszip/3.7.1

Upgrading `jszip` to v3.8.0 fixes this vulnerability. 

Is there any plan to release a new version of `exceljs` with this fix?

comments.author: DaphneChang
comments.body: I changed my `dependencies`  to correct it.

comments.author: pkgiriswamy
comments.body: Please update the "jszip" package and release a new version as it is a blocker for us.
